metadata.title: Noisy Ingest Workspace
metadata.subtitle: Diagnostics fixture
metadata.description: This packet intentionally contains malformed entries so the ingest layer can prove it is not a blind passthrough.
watchFor: The scene should still render after malformed entries are dropped.
Diagnostics should report why broken items disappeared.
Only the surviving nodes should participate in the solved layout.

guideSteps.label: Recovered claim
guideSteps.description: The valid claim that survives packet normalization.

tasks.title: Trace support for the claim
tasks.prompt: Confirm that the valid evidence and citation survive normalization.

claim.statement: The ingest layer should drop malformed packet items without collapsing the workspace.

answerBlocks.text: Valid answer detail remains in the scene after normalization.
This answer block should be dropped because it has no id.

evidence.text: Valid evidence survives and supports the claim.

contradictions.text: A valid contradiction survives even in a noisy packet.
